attributes.action: Fix the roads in the UK
attributes.additional_details:
The condition of the roads in England are getting close to being impossible to drive on. We are risking our lives everyday just from driving on the roads. We are at risk of tyres bursting and losing control of our cars or have to put ourselves and others at risk trying to avoid potholes.
As driving instructors we are now spending more time and money changing/fixing tyres rather than being focused on delivering safe and high quality lessons. 
THIS NEEDS TO CHANGE!
attributes.background: All over England we are suffering with dangerous road conditions and the number of potholes are getting out of hand. We would like to ask the government to make it a priority for the roads to be fixed ASAP.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Legislate for the repair of potholes within a time frame in the UK.
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/757761
